title: Flavorful Aerated Slovakian Pork Dumplings
description: A solo dinner dish featuring rum and rest meat, this diabetic friendly Slovakian recipe is both nutty and aerated, making for a delicious meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground pork, dark rum, almond flour, egg, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika, mixing well with your hands until just combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small dumplings, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Place the dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each dumpling.
Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 18 minutes, or until cooked through and lightly browned on the bottom.
While the dumplings are baking, prepare a steamer basket with boiling water.
Once the dumplings are done baking, place them in the steamer basket and steam for an additional 5 minutes to aerate.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
